title: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple Digital Streaming Release Date Revealed
text: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple became available on digital platforms on February 17, 2026. The film can be purchased or rented on Amazon Prime, Fandango at Home, and Apple TV. Following its digital release, Sony Pictures confirmed the film's arrival on physical media formats. The 4K UHD SteelBook, Blu-ray, and standard DVD versions launched on April 21, 2026. The film is also set to arrive on Netflix starting March 31, 2026, as part of Sony's distribution agreements. This release schedule reflects the film's shift from theatrical to home video and streaming platforms, providing multiple access points for audiences who may have missed the film during its theatrical run. The availability across various platforms suggests Sony is attempting to recoup losses from the theatrical underperformance through home video and streaming revenue.
